name: boss-jump
description: Attempt debug hook jump to level 5, screenshot, collect game state and diagnostics

args.expression: (function(){ if(window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL){ window.__GR_DEBUG_JUMP_TO_LEVEL(5); return 'jumped to LV5'; } return 'no debug hook available'; })()

steps.description: Attempt jump to level 5 via debug hook, gracefully report if unavailable
Capture canvas state after jump attempt

args.expression: (function(){ return { currentLevel: window.currentLevel, gameState_keys: window.gameState ? Object.keys(window.gameState).slice(0,10) : [], hasGame: typeof window.game !== 'undefined' }; })()
